name: insomnia-plugin-verint-token

insomnia.name: verint-token
insomnia.description: Automatically generates Verint API authentication headers using HMAC-SHA256 signing. Requires api_key_id and api_key environment variables.

author: Samer Koda
description: Insomnia plugin that automatically generates Verint API authentication headers using HMAC-SHA256 signing algorithm. The plugin reads api_key_id and api_key from environment variables and creates the proper Authorization header for Verint API requests, eliminating the need to manually generate authentication tokens.
